# FivetranAssets

Wraps `dagster-fivetran`'s `FivetranWorkspace` to materialize one Dagster asset per Fivetran connector. Pair with `fivetran_sync_sensor` (already in the registry) to trigger downstream runs when a sync completes.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `account_id` | `str` | Fivetran account ID. |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_key_env_var` | `str` | `"FIVETRAN_API_KEY"` | Env var with the Fivetran API key. |

### Catalog metadata

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `group_name` | `str` | `"fivetran"` | Asset group. |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `api_secret_env_var` | `str` | `"FIVETRAN_API_SECRET"` | Env var with the Fivetran API secret. |
| `connector_filter` | `List[str]` | — | Optional list of connector_ids to include. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML
```yaml
type: dagster_component_templates.FivetranAssetsComponent
attributes:
  account_id: <fill in>
  api_key_env_var: <fill in>
  api_secret_env_var: <fill in>
  connector_filter: <fill in>
  group_name: <fill in>
```

## Requirements

```
dagster
dagster-fivetran
```
